title: oenothera pallida subsp. runcinata
intro: Oenothera pallida subsp. runcinata, also known as the pale evening primrose, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Onagraceae family, native to North America. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to its high content of gamma-linolenic acid (GLA). The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving skin health, and supporting cardiovascular well-being. Oenothera pallida subsp. runcinata can be prepared as an herbal supplement in capsule or oil form, and is also used in topical creams and salves for skin care.
